questions.scenario: The team deploys `devpolaris-orders-api` as a container image and wants Azure to run replicas, expose HTTPS, keep logs, and support revision traffic. Which Azure concept is central to this service?

options.text: A container app inside a managed Container Apps environment.

questions.explanation: Container Apps gives the container image a managed runtime, ingress, revision history, scale behavior, and identity surface.

questions.scenario: The orders API runs as a container app, and the next release will move traffic between two revisions. The team needs enough evidence to explain what users may hit after the change. Which facts help explain a Container Apps production release?

options.text: The image tag used by each active revision.
Ingress target port and public or private exposure.
Only the name of the Azure subscription.

questions.explanation: A release review needs revision, traffic, and ingress details. Subscription context matters, but it does not explain how the container is currently serving traffic.
